title: What if Shinji was more like Ash Williams
display_title: What if Shinji was more like Ash Williams
wikitext:
[]: What if Shinji was more like Ash Williams?             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Dec 23, 2009 7:18 am Seeing as how there is a "What if Shinji were Mexican" thread I don't think this would hurt. What if Shinji was more like Ash Williams from the Evil Dead series? Discuss.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Dec 23, 2009 12:04 pm Everything he did would be groovy and his lines would be infinitely more quotable.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Dec 23, 2009 12:23 pm Sam Raimi would be a fantastic director of live action Eva if whatever studio and/or producer(s) stayed off his back (yeah, I'm looking at you , Sony)

[]: Re: What if Shinji was more like Ash Williams?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Dec 23, 2009 1:53 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: What if Shinji was more like Ash Williams from the Evil Dead series?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Dec 23, 2009 1:59 pm Come Third Impact, he'd be cutting his losses and making a break for Mexico.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Wed Dec 23, 2009 3:07 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Wed Dec 23, 2009 3:15 pm Then there would be no need to create a million threads on how much of a wimp Shinji is.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Fri Dec 25, 2009 3:18 am "Badass... wimp... I'm the kid with the EVA."

[]:             Quote Post by NickFury90 » Tue Dec 29, 2009 1:01 am Maybe. Just maybe Misato won't leave a huge mess of beer for me to clean up today. And maybe I'm a Chinese jet pilot

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 29, 2009 1:10 am "Good. Bad. I'm the guy with the Eva."

[]:             Quote Post by The-Happy-Go-Lucky-Wacko » Sun Aug 22, 2010 12:22 pm If that means his Eva would have a chainsaw, I can only say one word in response to that: Groovy.

[]:             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Sun Aug 22, 2010 1:01 pm scarmullet wrote:
